schema_version: v0 — component-charter shape; migrates into the intention envelope when MAP.md Q6 lands
what: The outward-facing voice of the system: where Cairn explains itself — and its design pattern — to people outside the build loop.
why: Telos 3 — share the tools, and the method, with others. A pattern others can't understand is a pattern they can't adopt or trust. This is deliberately NOT cairnmap: cairnmap answers 'what can I do here' to someone already inside the system, compiled from charters with zero inference; the press office answers 'how does this work, and why' to someone outside it, in authored prose. Different audience, different production mode — so it is a distinct component, not a corner of cairnmap.
state: v0 — founded 2026-07-15 with its first piece, IntentionBasedDesignForHumans.md.

contents.IntentionBasedDesignForHumans.md: the founding piece — the intention-based design pattern explained for an intelligent outsider

proof: each piece is a concept-piece: proved by human review (a quorum signature gate), not by the tester; it kicks back on rejection exactly like a red build. Obligation recorded in proofs/.
traces_to: Telos 3 (share the tools and the method with others)
Law 5 (intent shares an address — this folder carries its own why)
owner: Akien gates what ships outward from here (signature gate); CC drafts.
provenance: born by a hand-run intent nexus on 2026-07-15 — the /intent skill was installed but not yet loaded into the session, so the resolver occupied the nexus by hand (the role-replacement staircase at step zero). First non-code node-class exercised in the build.
